creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #17)
Not reviewed by Kirk though. The quality of the review turned out, in hindsight, to be lacking. As the original committer, I think Kirk's characterization is largely correct and instructive to others that wish to make commits in this area w/o running it past him: It's too easy to make a subtle mistake that had awful results due to a tiny mismatch in testing...
